description: Express app using axios.get reaching CVE-2022-0155 in follow-redirects through the axios → follow-redirects internal chain.

provenance.ground_truth_notes: app.fetchWithRedirects → axios.get → adapter → http.request wrapped by follow-redirects → vulnerable redirect handler

findings.human_justification: axios.get is invoked with maxRedirects > 0, which routes through follow-redirects' vulnerable redirect wrapper.
